title: Wing Stance
description: Ash of War learned from the Divine Beast Dancing Lion. Take a low stance with arms spread wide like the wings of the divine beast. Follow up with a light attack to unleash a flurry of slashing strikes, or a heavy attack to perform a powerful spinning slash.

title: Swift Slash
description: Ash of War associated with the twin blades of Rellana, Knight of the Twin Moons. Dash forward with blinding speed and deliver a rapid succession of cuts, leaving trails of moonlight in the wake of each strike.

title: Fire Serpent
description: Ash of War born of Messmer's impaling flame. Thrust the weapon into the ground to conjure a serpent of raging fire that surges forward along the earth, burning all in its path with the cruel heat of Messmer's ancient power.

title: Dryleaf Whirlwind
description: Ash of War taught by Dryleaf Dane, a wandering warrior who mastered unarmed combat. Spin the body in a fierce whirlwind of kicks and open-palm strikes, launching nearby enemies with the accumulated force of the rotation.

title: Palm Blast
description: Ash of War derived from the fighting style of Dryleaf Dane. Channel force into the open palm and release it in a concentrated burst, sending a wave of impact that staggers foes and can be chained into follow-up strikes.

title: Savage Lion's Claw
description: A ferocious variant of the Lion's Claw technique found within the depths of Shadow Keep. Leap high into the air and descend with a rolling somersault strike that delivers a savage claw blow with tremendous impact upon landing.

title: Igon's Drake Hunt
description: Ash of War born of Igon's undying hatred for Bayle the Dread. Let out a furious battle cry that briefly empowers the next attack, then deliver a leaping overhead strike aimed at felling the mightiest of drakes.

title: Ghostflame Call
description: Ash of War imbued with the deathly ghostflame of the Jagged Peak. Drag the weapon along the ground to ignite it with pale ghostflame, then release a wide sweeping strike that leaves a lingering trail of ghostly fire upon the earth.
